areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
areYouSureDeleteInstallment: This action will delete the entire purchase and all its associated installments. This action cannot be undone.
noTransactions: No transactions yet. Add one to get started!
noTransactionsForFilters: No transactions found for the applied filters.
signInToContinue: Sign in to continue to your clan's finances
unauthorizedDomainError: This domain is not authorized. Go to your Firebase project's Authentication > Settings > Authorized domains and add the domain you are currently using. Remember to restart the server if you change environment variables.
categoryExistsError: A category with this name already exists.
systemCategoryTooltip: This is a system category and cannot be modified.
amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number
noTaxes: No taxes recorded yet. Add one to get started!
taxExistsError: A tax with the same name, month, and year already exists.
taxesIntroText1: Record the taxes and services you pay periodically (e.g., Electricity, Water, Gas, Internet).
taxesIntroText2: Once a tax is recorded, use the action buttons to: Pay (which creates an expense transaction), Edit, or Record a new period for the same tax.
taxesIntroText3: The (+) button allows you to see the payment history for a tax.
transactionUpdatedDesc: Your transaction has been successfully updated.
paymentMethodInUseError: Cannot rename a payment method that is currently in use.
cardClosingDayDesc: Day of the month your card statement closes.
noInstallments: No pending or completed installments found.
installmentsIntroText1: All your purchases made with a 'Credit Card' and more than one installment will appear here automatically.
installmentsIntroText2: You will see a summary of your total debt and how much you have to pay in the current month.
installmentsIntroText3: Once all installments of a purchase are in the past, they will move to the 'Completed Installments' section.
supportMessage1: FinanClan is a free and open-source project, made with ❤️ from Argentina.
supportMessage2: If this app is useful to you, please consider sharing it with your friends and family. It helps a lot!
supportMessage3: If you wish to contribute to its maintenance and future improvements, you can do so through the following links.
deleteAccountWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data, including transactions, categories, and taxes, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccountConfirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccountInputPrompt: To confirm, please type the confirmation word below.
goodbyeMessage1: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted.
goodbyeMessage2: Thank you for using FinanClan. We hope it was helpful for you. You are welcome to come back anytime!
goodbyeMessage3: If you know someone who could benefit from this tool, please consider sharing it.
areYouSureDeleteSavingsFund: Are you sure you want to delete this savings fund? This action cannot be undone.
areYouSureDeleteFundWithBalance: This fund has a balance of {amount}. If you continue, this amount will be transferred to your main balance and the fund will be deleted.
noSavingsFunds: No savings funds yet. Create one to start saving for your goals!
savingsFundTargetAmountPositive: Target amount must be a positive number.
withdrawAmountError: Withdrawal amount cannot be greater than the current balance.
depositAmountError: Deposit amount cannot be greater than the remaining amount to reach the goal.
confirmCloseFundDescription: You've reached your savings goal! The total of {amount} will be transferred to your main balance.
deleteFundErrorTransferCategory: The 'Transfers' system category was not found. Could not proceed with fund deletion.
deleteFundErrorPaymentMethod: No enabled payment method was found. Please enable at least one payment method to proceed.
selectPaymentMethodReceive: Select payment method to receive funds
noSavingsFundsProgressDesc: To get started, open the main menu (top left) and select 'Savings Funds' to create your first goal.
noInstallmentsDesc: This chart shows your future monthly payments. To generate it, add an 'Expense' with a 'Credit Card' and select more than one installment.
termsAcceptanceText: By accessing and using FinanClan ('the Application'), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and all applicable laws. If you do not agree with any of the detailed terms, you may not use our financial recording service.
termsServiceDescriptionText: You agree to use the application personally for managing and organizing your finances. The use of techniques to inject code, alter the original design, or exploit any functionality to compromise the security or experience of other users is prohibited.
termsPrivacyAndDataText: FinanClan is provided 'as is' and 'as available', without warranties of any kind. While we make every technical effort to keep your information secure and available, we are not responsible for accidental data loss resulting from platform errors or hosting service interruptions.
termsLimitationOfLiabilityText: Our platform uses federated authentication linked to Google. Access security is tied to the strength of your Google account. You are solely responsible for keeping your credentials safe. We do not collect sensitive information or passwords locally.
termsIntellectualPropertyText: The source code of this application is distributed under the MIT License. However, the name 'FinanClan', logos, and branding elements are the exclusive property of the creator and may not be used commercially without prior consent.
termsChangesAndTerminationText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. You may terminate the agreement by permanently deleting your account from the user settings, which will purge all your data irrevocably.
savingsFundsIntroText1: Create funds for your specific goals (e.g., 'Vacation to the beach', 'New Console').
savingsFundsIntroText2: Use the 'Deposit' and 'Withdraw' buttons to move money between your main balance and your funds.
savingsFundsIntroText3: Once you reach your goal (or just want to close the fund), use the options in the menu to transfer the balance back and delete the fund.
welcomeSubtitle: You are one step away from taking control of your finances.
welcomeDesc: To get started, you need to define when your 'financial month' begins. This is called a billing cycle. Usually, it's the day you receive your salary. Select the start date below.
welcomeTermsText1: By continuing, you agree to our
confirmNewCycleDesc: Select a start date for the new cycle. The previous cycle will automatically close on the day before.
newCycleStartedDesc: Your new billing cycle has begun.
areYouSureDeleteCategory: Are you sure you want to delete this category? This action cannot be undone.
deleteCategoryWarning: This category has no associated transactions. You can delete it safely.
categoryInUseError: This category cannot be deleted because it is being used by one or more transactions.
budgetInsightsDescription: Your financial projections for this cycle.
historicCycleInfo: This is a summary of a past cycle. Projections are not available.
cardSummariesIntroText1: This section consolidates all unpaid expenses from your credit cards that are due for payment.
cardSummariesIntroText2: Each card will have its own summary showing the total amount and the list of individual expenses.
cardSummariesIntroText3: When you pay the summary, a single expense is created in your main balance, and the individual card expenses are marked as paid.
noCardSummaries: No pending card summaries to pay. Good job!
payCardSummaryDesc: You are about to pay the summary for {cardName}. This will create an expense in your main balance.
noPaymentHistory: No payment history for the last 6 months.
privacyDataRecollectionText: When authenticating through Google OAuth, we collect only your name, email address, and public profile picture. This data is used exclusively to identify your account within the platform and personalize your experience. Any financial information you enter (transactions, categories, budgets) is stored privately.
privacyUseOfInformationText: The financial information entered is strictly private and associated with your unique identifier. We never sell, share, or grant third-party access to your personal data or expense records. The sole purpose is to allow you to effectively manage your personal finances.
privacyCookiesText: Our platform uses essential technical cookies automatically generated by the identity provider to maintain a validated authentication session. We do not use cross-tracking cookies or cookies for advertising purposes.
privacyUserRightsText: You have full control over your account. In the Settings section, you can permanently delete your account, which irrevocably purges all your records from our database immediately.
privacyChangesText: We reserve the right to update this policy at any time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of these changes.
landingHeroTagline: The financial clarity your life needs.
landingCardDesc: FinanClan is the ultimate tool to organize your personal or family finances in a simple, visual, and secure way.
landingFeature1: Full control of your income and expenses.
landingFeature3: Management and annual projection of your installment purchases.
landingFeature4: Recording and tracking of recurring taxes.
landingFeature5: Interactive charts to visualize your financial health.
landingFeature6: Security and privacy for your data.
invalidIconError: The selected icon is not valid.
notFoundOrNoPermission: The item was not found or you do not have permission to modify it.
billingCycleDateError: The new cycle start date must be after the previous cycle's start date.
